form_block_navigation_description: Your changes have not been saved. If you leave, you will lose your changes.
user_form_description: Update the profile details associated with your account.
sign_up_description: Create an account for this site.
user_central_auth_required: Reconnect to Krakstack Auth to manage your central account settings.
user_central_auth_reconnect_error: Could not reconnect to Krakstack Auth.
user_security_description: Protect your account with authenticator app verification.
user_two_factor_description: Use a time-based one-time password from your authenticator app.
user_two_factor_scan_description: Add this account to your authenticator app, then enter the generated code below.
user_two_factor_backup_codes_warning: Save these backup codes now. They are shown only during setup.
user_api_keys_description: Create and manage API keys for your user account.
user_api_key_create_error: Could not create the API key.
user_api_key_delete_error: Could not delete the API key.
user_api_key_created_description: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
user_accounts_description: Connect external sign-in providers to this account.
user_account_google_description: Use your Google account as a sign-in option.
user_account_revoke_description: Revoke {provider} from this account. You will not be able to use it to sign in unless you connect it again.
user_account_password_description: Use an email and password as a sign-in option.
user_account_password_connected_descript: Password sign-in is enabled for this account.
user_account_password_change_description: Update the password used to sign in with your email.
organizations_description: Create, edit, and switch between organizations you belong to.
organization_create_description: Create a workspace for team-based access.
organization_edit_description: Update the active organization's canonical details and localized profile.
organization_slug_description: Leave blank to generate one from the name.
organization_switcher_empty: You do not belong to any organizations yet.
user_api_key_permissions_description: Choose the permissions this API key should receive.
registry_search_description: Search registry items and open their documentation.
search_menu_description: Search for an item to open.
api_key_rate_limit_notice: API keys are limited to 1,000 requests per day by default. Contact an admin to request changes.
home_description: Production-ready blocks and libraries you can add to your app with shadcn. Built with TanStack, Effect, and Drizzle.
krakstack_site_template_description: A live full-stack TanStack Start template showing the app patterns, UI blocks, Effect services, Drizzle database setup, i18n, and CRUD reference implementation.
krakstack_site_auth_description: The hosted identity and API-key service for KrakStack apps, providing OAuth sign-in, organization-aware sessions, and shared auth infrastructure.
krakstack_site_template_overview: template.krakstack.net is the hosted preview of the KrakStack starter app. Use it to see how the template behaves before cloning the source or installing registry items into your own application.
krakstack_site_template_feature_start: TanStack Start routing and server rendering in a working application shell.
krakstack_site_template_feature_effect: Effect HTTP APIs, OpenAPI documentation, service layers, and Drizzle/PostgreSQL persistence.
krakstack_site_template_feature_state: shadcn UI components, forms, tables, and optimistic Effect Atom client state.
krakstack_site_template_feature_i18n: Paraglide English/French i18n and localized routing patterns.
krakstack_site_auth_overview: auth.krakstack.net is the central authentication service used by KrakStack projects. It gives apps a shared identity provider and API-key verification surface without each project owning that infrastructure from scratch.
krakstack_site_auth_feature_oauth: OAuth sign-in for KrakStack applications and registry auth blocks.
krakstack_site_auth_feature_orgs: Organization-aware user sessions for apps that need team or tenant context.
krakstack_site_auth_feature_keys: API-key management and verification for service-to-service or external API access.
krakstack_site_auth_feature_registry: Better Auth integration patterns used by the KrakStack auth, sign-in, sign-up, and user-button registry items.
organization_translation_description: Localized organization details stored in metadata.
organization_logo_upload_error: Could not upload the organization logo.
organization_members_description: Review active members, update roles, and remove access when needed.
organization_member_role_error: Could not update the member role.
organization_invite_member_description: Send an invitation to join this organization with the selected role.
organization_invitations_description: Track invitations that have not been accepted yet.
user_profile_image_upload_error: Could not upload your profile photo.
